hook: On a big platform, you don't set your price. They do.
vo: Some platforms decide what you charge. And take a cut on top.
Faresay works differently. You set your own price. You keep what you charge.
No commission. Free to start. Optional monthly plan costs less than a single session.
Your clients. Your rate. Your call.
onscreen_text: You don't set your price. They do.
cta: Set your own prices. Keep what you charge.
broll_notes: Close-up of a phone screen showing a simple pricing input field, a finger typing a number, then a checkmark. No faces. Neutral desk surface, soft light.
